name: LGM
description: Connect La Growth Machine to Claude — manage campaigns, leads, audiences and conversations directly from AI.
long_description:
La Growth Machine (LGM) is a multichannel sales outreach platform. This extension gives Claude direct access to your LGM data: list campaigns, analyze performance, explore leads, read conversations, and save AI-generated preferences. No coding required — just install, enter your API key, and start asking Claude about your outreach.

Usage analytics: each tool call sends a single first-party analytics event (the event name and the tool name only — no conversation content, no lead or message data) to La Growth Machine's own API at https://apiv2.lagrowthmachine.com/flow/tracking/mcp, authenticated with the same API key you provide. This is opt-out: enable the "Disable usage analytics" toggle (or set LGM_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=true) to stop all analytics requests. See the README and privacy policy for details.

api_key.title: LGM API Key
api_key.description: Your La Growth Machine API key

disable_telemetry.title: Disable usage analytics
disable_telemetry.description: When enabled, the server sends no analytics events. By default each tool call sends one first-party event (event name + tool name only, no conversation content) to La Growth Machine's API.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List all campaigns with filters (status, search) and pagination.

tools.name: get_campaign_stats
tools.description: Get detailed statistics for a campaign (acceptance rate, reply rate, conversions).

tools.name: get_audience_leads
tools.description: List leads in an audience with details (name, company, job title, email, LinkedIn).

tools.name: get_lead_logs
tools.description: Get activity logs for a lead (emails, LinkedIn messages, connection requests).

tools.name: get_lead_conversations
tools.description: Get all conversations with a lead across channels (LinkedIn, email).

tools.name: get_conversation_messages
tools.description: Get all messages in a conversation with content and timestamps.

tools.name: get_campaign_messages
tools.description: Get message templates for a campaign with HTML content and sequence order.

tools.name: get_audience
tools.description: Get detailed audience info (name, description, size, type, import status).

tools.name: save_identity_preference
tools.description: Save a preference for an identity to personalize AI-generated content.

tools.name: create_audience_from_linkedin_url
tools.description: Create or populate an audience from a LinkedIn search, Sales Navigator search, or LinkedIn post URL.

tools.name: list_identities
tools.description: List all connected identities (LinkedIn / email) for the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_conversations_to_reply
tools.description: List inbox conversations waiting for the user's reply (lead spoke last, thread open).

tools.name: get_unread_conversations
tools.description: List unread inbox conversations, newest first.

tools.name: get_favourite_conversations
tools.description: List favourited / starred conversations, optionally only those where the lead replied.

tools.name: search_conversations
tools.description: Search and filter the whole conversation inbox by text, identity, campaign, audience, channel, status, dates and flags.

tools.name: snooze_conversation
tools.description: Snooze a conversation until a later time, hiding it from the active inbox.

tools.name: unsnooze_conversation
tools.description: Un-snooze a conversation, bringing it back into the active inbox.

tools.name: archive_conversation
tools.description: Archive a conversation, removing it from the active inbox.

tools.name: unarchive_conversation
tools.description: Restore an archived conversation back to the active inbox.

tools.name: list_members
tools.description: List the members (users) of the account — needed to pick a memberId for sending LinkedIn messages.

tools.name: send_linkedin_message
tools.description: Send a LinkedIn text or voice message to a lead from a connected identity.

tools.name: send_email_message
tools.description: Send an email to a lead from a connected email identity (new thread or reply).
